title: To duplicate or not to duplicate - Monday for iOS and Android

posts.author: yanivy (Yaniv Yakubovich)
posts.cookedHtml:
We use Monday.com to manage our product development. We have an epic board and a stories board that are connected.
We have an iOS team and an Android team. The challenge is to sync requirements between the two teams. Currently, we duplicate the tickets from one team to another and this results with a lot of missing requirements and lack of synchorionization.

How do you handle a similar situation?
